vocab.api: Define routes with app.get(), app.post(), etc. or use express.Router() for modular routing. Express 5 supports async route handlers natively — errors from rejected promises are passed to error middleware automatically.
vocab.authentication: Use passport.js with passport-jwt for JWT auth, or jsonwebtoken directly. Set tokens in httpOnly cookies via res.cookie(). Use middleware functions for route protection.
vocab.database: Use Prisma ORM for type-safe queries with any SQL database. For MongoDB, use Mongoose. Use connection pooling — Prisma manages this automatically.
vocab.validation: Use zod for runtime validation of request bodies and query params. Define schemas with z.object() and validate with schema.parse() or schema.safeParse().
vocab.middleware: Express middleware executes in order. Use express.json() for body parsing, cors() for CORS, helmet() for security headers. Error-handling middleware takes 4 args: (err, req, res, next).
